high_severity_fixes.title: Fix Pinia store name conflicts in deob_07 header mapping table
high_severity_fixes.description: The header mapping table in deob_07 uses different names for Pinia store composables than the actual definitions in deob_06. This causes confusion when cross-referencing modules.

correct_values.Dt(): useConfigStore() -- Pinia config 스토어 (locale 관리). Note: translate/x() 함수가 내부적으로 useConfigStore를 호출하므로 useI18n은 간접적 별칭

high_severity_fixes.fix_action: Update the composableMapping section in the deob_07 header comment block (lines 52-72) to match the canonical store names defined in deob_06_app_widget_sdk.js lines 717-850. Add a note that x() wraps useConfigStore internally.

high_severity_fixes.title: Add JSDoc comments to deob_07 component definitions
high_severity_fixes.description: Only 1 JSDoc block exists in 2506 lines. The 38 Vue components (Apparel, Book, Acc, 25 post-process, 4 quantity, etc.) have section header comments but no JSDoc on their defineComponent() calls.
high_severity_fixes.fix_action: For each component's defineComponent() call, add a JSDoc block with: (1) Korean description of the component's purpose, (2) @component tag, (3) @prop descriptions for each prop, (4) @emits for each emit event. Prioritize the 3 main components (Apparel, Book, Acc) and 10 sub-components first. The 25 post-process components follow a repeating pattern and can share a template JSDoc.

medium_severity_fixes.title: Harmonize component names between deob_06 and deob_07
medium_severity_fixes.description: Choose one canonical name per component and update both files. Recommendation: use deob_06 names (ImageButton, Selector, ButtonRadio, ColorPicker, RadioList) as canonical since they are the defining module.

medium_severity_fixes.title: Harmonize utility function names between deob_06 and deob_07
medium_severity_fixes.description: Same function appears under different names in different modules.

medium_severity_fixes.title: Add inline rename comments for editor SDK single-letter variables
medium_severity_fixes.description: 62 single-letter variable patterns in deob_editor_sdk.js have comment-only documentation. Consider adding /* renamed: X = originalName */ inline annotations at each usage site, or at minimum expanding the comment block at lines 10447-10500.

medium_severity_fixes.title: Document Vue render helper retention rationale
medium_severity_fixes.description: deob_07 retains minified Vue helper names (g, V, M, S, etc.) in render functions. Add a rationale comment explaining why these are not renamed (would break code / no semantic value in renaming framework internals).

medium_severity_fixes.title: Include TRANSLATIONS_KO dictionary
medium_severity_fixes.description: The Korean translation dictionary (HT/TRANSLATIONS_KO) is referenced as TODO at deob_05:1503 but not included. Since keys and values are identical Korean strings, include it for completeness.
